characters.appearance: Young adult male with a slim build and tan complexion. He has short, spiky black hair and dark eyes. His facial features are natural and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: A beige and brown plaid button-down shirt worn open over a plain white t-shirt.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैंने रोज़ सिर्फ दस मिनट English speaking practice की, और दो हफ़्ते बाद का result देखिए। [I practiced speaking English for just ten minutes daily, and look at the result after two weeks.]
Character A says: मुझे लगता था कि fluent English बोलने के लिए सालों coaching जाना पड़ेगा। [I used to think I'd have to go to coaching for years to speak fluent English.]
Character A says: पर असली problem grammar नहीं, hesitation थी। [But the real problem wasn't grammar, it was hesitation.]
Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ दस मिनट लगे, जो हम वैसे भी reels देखने में waste कर देते हैं। [It took just ten minutes a day, which we waste watching reels anyway.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable time commitment (10 mins/day) and a clear result.
- Addresses the common misconception that fluency requires years of expensive coaching.
- Reframes the problem from lack of knowledge to lack of practice/hesitation.
- Compares the effort to mindless scrolling, making it feel highly achievable.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
finally used my screen time for good by improving my English fluency
I PRACTICED SPEAKING ENGLISH FOR TEN MINUTES A DAY HERE'S WHAT HAPPENED AFTER TWO WEEKS I USED TO THINK FLUENCY WOULD TAKE YEARS OF COACHING THEN I FOUND OUT THAT THE REAL PROBLEM WAS JUST HESITATION ALL IT TOOK WAS TEN MINUTES A DAY AND THAT'S LESS THAN ONE REELS SCROLL SESSION

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: देखिए, मैं बस Supernova app खोलता हूँ, एक situation चुनता हूँ, और बोलना शुरू करता हूँ। [Look, I just open the Supernova app, pick a situation, and start speaking.]
Character A says: AI tutor मुझे तुरंत बताता है कि मैंने कहाँ गलती की, बिना judge किए। [The AI tutor instantly tells me where I made a mistake, without judging.]
Character A says: I am working here since two years. [I am working here since two years.]
Character A says: [sighs] [[sighs]]
Character A says: Let's try it again. [Let's try it again.]
Character A says: I have been working here for two years. [I have been working here for two years.]
[app chime] [[app chime]]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core product loop: open app, pick a real-world scenario, and speak.
- Highlights the AI tutor's non-judgmental, instant feedback.
- Shows a relatable, common grammatical mistake Indian learners make, and how the app helps correct it immediately.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
finally used my screen time for good by improving my English fluency
LOOK I SIMPLY OPEN SUPERNOVA PICK A SITUATION AND START PRACTICING THE AI TUTOR TELLS ME EXACTLY WHERE I MADE A MISTAKE I AM WORKING HERE SINCE TWO YEARS LET'S TRY IT AGAIN I HAVE BEEN WORKING HERE FOR TWO YEARS
AI Tutor Feedback
Job Interview Practice
Grammar Check
I am working here since two years.
Correction: I have been working here for two years.
Great improvement! Let's continue.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: दो हफ़्तों में ही office में मेरे colleagues ने notice किया। [In just two weeks, my colleagues at the office noticed.]
Character A says: मुझे कोई fake accent नहीं चाहिए, बस meetings में confidently अपनी बात रखनी है। [I don't want any fake accent, I just want to present my points confidently in meetings.]
Character A says: और सबसे अच्छी बात? इसमें दिन के सिर्फ दस मिनट लगते हैं। [And the best part? It only takes ten minutes of your day.]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova download करें। [Download Supernova today.]
Character A says: Fluency के लिए घंटों नहीं, बस सही practice चाहिए। [Fluency doesn't need hours, it just needs the right practice.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff: workplace recognition and increased confidence.
- Reassures the user that the goal is clear communication, not pretending to be someone else (no fake accents).
- Ends with a strong, low-barrier Call To Action emphasizing the short daily time commitment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
finally used my screen time for good by improving my English fluency
AFTER TWO WEEKS MY COLLEAGUES ACTUALLY NOTICED I DON'T WANT A FAKE ACCENT I JUST WANT TO SPEAK CONFIDENTLY IN MEETINGS AND THE BEST PART ABOUT THIS IT ONLY TAKES TEN MINUTES OUT OF YOUR DAY DOWNLOAD SUPERNOVA NOW FLUENCY DOESN'T NEED HOURS IT JUST NEEDS THE RIGHT PRACTICE
